title: InventoryFile
description:
One `spec/inventory/kind=inventory/area=<area>/[surface=<surface>/]<key>.yaml`
file: the schema envelope (additive top-level YAML keys, design D3)
flattened alongside the file's own entries (also flattened, keyed by
their dotted entry id ‚Äî `idolive.hub.hub-header`, ‚Ä¶).

Actor.description:
Who/what produced a record ‚Äî structured, never a bare `by: String`
(design D2, the donor audit's biggest cross-family gap).

`role` is `Option` (S11 design D5, "actor backfill is best-effort
from adjacent fields; absent stays absent"): a migrated legacy
record whose only source field is a bare `by: "legacy-ci-machine"`
string carries no role information at all ‚Äî `canon migrate` maps
that string to `agent_id` and leaves `role: null` rather than
guessing, so the field must be able to express "unknown", not just
"known". Every record canon itself originates still supplies a role
via [`Actor::new`]; only backfilled/migrated records use
[`Actor::new_unattributed`].

InventoryEntry.description:
One inventory entry ‚Äî `covered_by` XOR `out_of_scope` (donor
convention; `out_of_scope`'s own shape varies by entry ‚Äî a bare
`true` or a reason string ‚Äî kept open rather than guessed).

InventoryEntryRef.description:
The donor's existing 4-field reference (`pin`/`file`/`symbol`/
`lines`) ‚Äî kept as its own type (not [`crate::family::refs::Ref`]):
it carries `pin` (the shared type does not) and `lines` stays the
donor's own `"262-270"` hyphen-string, never reparsed into
[`crate::family::refs::LineRange`] since nothing about it is
ambiguous or in need of upgrading.

RoleId.description: kebab-case role slug (`[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*`), e.g. `implementer`, `reviewer` ‚Äî joins: not a join-spine key; used by `Actor.role` and `regime_key`'s `<role>` segment

ScenarioId.description: `<area>.<surface>.<nn>` ‚Äî `[a-z0-9-]+\.[a-z0-9-]+\.\d{2,}`; never renumbered once assigned ‚Äî joins: spec ‚Üî test ‚Üî ledger ‚Üî divergence

SessionId.description: opaque, non-empty agent-CLI session token; derivation source varies by adapter (Claude Code/Codex: transcript filename stem; omp/pi: in-file header `id` field) ‚Äî this type validates shape only, never a single fixed format ‚Äî joins: session ‚Üî cost ‚Üî run ‚Üî trajectory
